mandatory_caps.name: Bill of Materials
mandatory_caps.description: Structured definition of the components, quantities, and assembly relationships that make up a manufactured product. Foundation for every other manufacturing function.

mandatory_caps.name: Routings, Operations & Work Centers
mandatory_caps.description: Defines the sequence of operations required to produce an item, the work centers each operation runs on, and the standard times for setup, run, and teardown.

mandatory_caps.name: Work Orders & Job Cards
mandatory_caps.description: Create, schedule, execute, and close production work orders against BOMs and routings — the central operational artifact of a discrete manufacturing ERP.

mandatory_caps.name: Material Requirements Planning
mandatory_caps.description: Net-requirements explosion from demand (sales orders + forecast) through BOMs and inventory policies, generating planned purchase and production orders to meet demand without stock-outs or excess.

mandatory_caps.name: Production Scheduling & Capacity Planning
mandatory_caps.description: Assign work orders to work centers across a time horizon, respecting finite capacity and operation sequence — distinct from MRP which generates orders without regard to capacity.

mandatory_caps.name: Quality Management
mandatory_caps.description: Plan, execute, and record quality inspections against materials, work in progress, and finished goods, with non-conformance tracking and corrective-action workflows.

mandatory_caps.name: Inventory & Work-in-Progress Tracking
mandatory_caps.description: Manufacturing-specific inventory management: raw materials, WIP, and finished goods tracked by lot, serial, or bin across production locations.

mandatory_caps.name: Product Costing & Variance Analysis
mandatory_caps.description: Calculate standard and actual cost of manufactured goods, post production variances to finance, and provide cost visibility to planners and accountants.

mandatory_caps.name: Lot/Serial Traceability & Genealogy
mandatory_caps.description: End-to-end forward and backward traceability from raw material lot through every production step to customer shipment — required for food, pharma, automotive, and aerospace. Supports recall.

mandatory_caps.name: Manufacturing EHS Compliance
mandatory_caps.description: Environmental, health and safety integration tied to manufacturing: PPE requirements, hazardous-material handling, incident capture, and regulatory reporting.

preferred_caps.name: Shop Floor Execution
preferred_caps.description: Real-time shop-floor interface for operators: start/stop operations, record output, scan materials, capture quality, report downtime. Bridges ERP work orders (ISA-95 level 4) and the physical process

preferred_caps.name: Engineering Change Management
preferred_caps.description: Formal workflow for proposing, reviewing, approving, and implementing changes to BOMs, routings, and product specifications — with full audit trail and impact assessment.

preferred_caps.name: Product Master (Basic)
preferred_caps.description: Maintain an item master with revision control, attach engineering documents like CAD drawings and specs, and track item status through the lifecycle from in-design to obsolete.

preferred_caps.name: Subcontract & Outsourced Manufacturing
preferred_caps.description: Send materials to an external manufacturer who performs part or all of the production and returns finished or semi-finished goods. Distinct from a simple purchase because the organisation owns the mat

preferred_caps.name: Process & Batch Manufacturing
preferred_caps.description: Manufacturing mode for industries making fluids, powders, chemicals, pharmaceuticals, and food — where production is by recipe, yields are variable, and by-products, co-products, and reverse BOMs matt

preferred_caps.name: Configure-to-Order Manufacturing
preferred_caps.description: Support organisations that run multiple manufacturing modes simultaneously — discrete, repetitive, make-to-stock, make-to-order, engineer-to-order, configure-to-order — from the same system.

preferred_caps.name: Demand Planning & Forecasting
preferred_caps.description: Generate the demand signal that feeds MRP: statistical forecasts, sales-and-operations planning (S&OP) inputs, and collaborative planning with customers and suppliers.

preferred_caps.name: Rough-Cut Capacity & S&OP Integration
preferred_caps.description: High-level capacity check that validates the feasibility of the master production schedule against critical resources before MRP explodes the detail — the bridge between S&OP and MRP.

preferred_caps.name: IoT & Machine Data Collection
preferred_caps.description: Direct integration with production equipment and sensors for automated data capture — OEE, status, output, downtime, cycle times — without operator manual entry.

preferred_caps.name: OEE & Performance Analytics
preferred_caps.description: Canonical manufacturing KPIs and dashboards for plant managers: availability, performance, quality, OEE, throughput, yield.

preferred_caps.name: Repair, Rework & Returned-Goods Manufacturing
preferred_caps.description: Handle goods that come back from customers or fail internal quality, and need to go through a rework or repair process — distinct from normal production because the input is a finished good, not raw m

preferred_caps.name: Labour & Shop Floor Time
preferred_caps.description: Track operator time against operations and work orders, feed payroll and costing, and provide visibility into labour efficiency and utilisation.

preferred_caps.name: Energy, Utility & Sustainability Tracking
preferred_caps.description: Capture energy and utility consumption per production run, attribute to products, and feed sustainability and carbon reporting — increasingly required for CBAM, CSRD, and similar regulations.

preferred_caps.name: Maintenance Integration
preferred_caps.description: Bridge between the manufacturing module and the asset/maintenance module: planned downtime for PM, automatic work requests on breakdown, shared calendar for production scheduling.

preferred_caps.name: Cloud and Multi-Device Accessibility
preferred_caps.description: The solution works on phones, tablets, and desktops. Universal requirement — PSG asks every vendor "is this cloud and multi-device accessible?" as the first question on every sol cat. Factory supervis

mandatory_caps.name: Asset Register & Hierarchy
mandatory_caps.description: Centralised inventory of every asset the organisation owns or manages, with hierarchical structure, classification, and identifying metadata.

mandatory_caps.name: Asset Lifecycle Management
